# GitHub Copilot instructions for CanKonkuk

This repository uses the top-level `AGENTS.md` to provide concise guidance for AI coding agents.

See: [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md)

Guidance summary for Copilot/agents
- Prefer small, focused changes to C# scripts under `Assets/`.
- Do not modify generated folders (`Library/`, `Temp/`, `obj/`) or perform Editor builds without confirmation.
- When in doubt, open an issue or ask the repo owner before running Unity Editor-level operations.
